title: New Sequence command (Vision menu)
description:
The New Sequence command is used to create a new vision sequence in the current project.

To create a new sequence

1. Type in a name for the sequence. The name must be alpha numeric and a maximum of eight characters.

2. Click OK to create the sequence. If there is already a sequence by the same name in the current project, then an error message will be displayed.

When a new sequence is created, the vision image window graphics will be cleared and the Sequence tab will be activated, showing the new sequence properties. Also, all of the object toolbar buttons will be activated, if this is the first new sequence.

The default properties for a new vision sequence are as follows:

Property	Value

Calibration	None

Camera	1

CameraBrightness	128

CameraContrast	128

ImageFile	None

ImageSource	1 - Camera

RuntimeAcquire	1 - Stationary

RuntimeFreeze	1 - True

Shortcuts
